content.text:
Looking at the image, the track runs straight ahead with the dashed centerline visible and the car appears to be slightly left of center but on course heading eastward.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 112, target = (112 + 5) % 121 = 117
- Target WP117: x=5.6056, y=0.6843
- Car: x=2.0618, y=0.8079, heading=-21.19°
- dy = 0.6843 - 0.8079 = -0.1236
- dx = 5.6056 - 2.0618 = 3.5438
- bearing = atan2(-0.1236, 3.5438) = -2.00°
- delta = -2.00° - (-21.19°) = +19.19°
- Positive delta → waypoint is to the LEFT → steer LEFT (positive steering)

Delta ~19.2° (was 20.4°), slowly improving. Continue moderate left correction.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track runs straight east ahead, car heading -21.2° with delta=+19.2° still requiring left correction to align with the eastward centerline.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn (CCW heading increase), negative = right turn (CW)",
    "Track centerline y~0.68 at this straight section, car y~0.81 — slightly north of center",
    "Car heading slowly correcting leftward: -43.96 → -30.52 → -25.60 → -22.43 → -21.19",
    "Delta decreasing slowly: 23.6 → 20.4 → 19.2 — correction is working but gradual",
    "Track runs nearly due east for next ~20 waypoints (y stays ~0.68)",
    "After heading aligns with track (~-2°), reduce steering quickly to avoid overshoot",
    "Track width 0.76m — very narrow, precision required",
    "Once delta < 10°, switch to 0 or minimal steering to avoid oscillation",
    "Progress 94.3% — nearly complete lap, stay on track at all costs",
    "Speed 1.5 now available — car is at 1.5 speed despite previous 0.75 command, action may have changed"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.968, 2.021, 2.062],
    "y": [0.807, 0.806, 0.808],
    "yaw": [-25.60, -22.43, -21.19]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP117 at (5.606, 0.684): dy=-0.124, dx=3.544, bearing=-2.00°, delta=+19.2° → LEFT steer needed",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
